attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
NTSV.SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV_KEY AS SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV_KEY
,NTSV.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID AS SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID
,NTSV.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM         AS  BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM       
,NTSV.PRODUCT_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY  
,SUM(RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT+RU_CREDIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT) AS INVOICE_AMOUNT
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE LINE 	
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NAT
ON NAT.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=LINE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT1
ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY=NAT1.AR_TRX_KEY
INNER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
ON NAT1.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
AND NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME NOT  IN ('ICMS-XAAS')	
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV NTSV
ON NAT. SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID = NTSV.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID           
AND NAT.SUBSCRIPTION_CD=NTSV.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM  
AND LINE.PRODUCT_KEY=NTSV.PRODUCT_KEY
--WHERE NTSV.SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD IN ('Active','Renewed')  commented as part of June Rel
WHERE 1=2
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4

SELECT 
'SBP' AS TRANSACTION_TYPE,              
/*
CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE='SERVICE' THEN 'Y'  
WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE <>'SERVICE' THEN 
CASE WHEN  ALCTN.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD IN ('Service','Software')   AND MONETIZATION_TYPE_CD  IN ('Term','Usage') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END  END AS RPO_FLG,    */
CASE WHEN NSUB.SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD IN ('Active','Renewed') THEN
(CASE WHEN NSUB.TERM_START_DTM <= DATE  THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END)
ELSE 'N' END AS RPO_FLG   ,
CAST(NSUB.UNBILLED_REV_LOCAL_AMT*(COALESCE(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,100)/100) * (coalesce(NXSCA.SPLIT_PCT,100)/100.000000) *  COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(26,16)),CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(26,16))) AS DECIMAL(26,7) ) AS UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT,                    
(SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG  ='Y' ) AS PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH,         
(SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG  ='Y' ) AS FISCAL_MTH,                     
'Cisco' AS SRC_ENTITY,                     
NXSCA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,           
NSUB.PRODUCT_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY,                   
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,               
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,         
'UNKNOWN' AS WEB_ORDER_ID,                  
COALESCE(TRX.BILL_TO_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY,-999) AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,          
COALESCE(TRX.SHIP_TO_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY,-999) AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,         
COALESCE(TRX.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY,-999) AS SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY ,        
COALESCE(TRX.END_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY,-999) AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY,              
CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE='SERVICE' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SERVICE_FLG,                 
CASE WHEN NP.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD NOT IN 'UNKNOWN' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS CORP_FLG,                  
NSUB.TERM_START_DTM                 as  CONTRACT_START_DTM, 
NSUB.TERM_END_DTM                   as  CONTRACT_END_DTM,  
CAST((CAST(CAST(NSUB.TERM_END_DTM AS DATE) -  CAST(NSUB.TERM_START_DTM AS DATE) AS INTEGER)*12(FLOAT))/365 AS DECIMAL(15,6) ) AS CONTRACT_TERM ,
NSOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER AS CONTRACT_NUM,                 
TRX.BK_DEAL_ID AS ERP_DEAL_ID ,                  
'1900-01-01' AS AUTO_RELEASE_DT,  
'=' AS FHI_BNI_FLG, 
SOTV.DV_CISCO_BOOKED_DT AS CISCO_BOOKED_DT ,                
'1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS ORACLE_BOOK_DTM,
FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AS PROCESS_DT,                    
'1900-01-01' AS SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT ,            
'=' AS HOLD_FLG,                      
COALESCE(NSO.EARLY_SHIP_ALLOWED_FLAG,'=') AS EARLY_SHIP_FLG,                
'=' AS SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG      ,
'1900-01-01' AS CUST_RQSTD_SHIPMENT_DT ,       
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,               
USER EDW_CREATE_USER,               
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM,                
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER ,             
COALESCE(ORDERED_PRODUCT_KEY,NSUB.PRODUCT_KEY) AS ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY,        
COALESCE ( XOA.ATTRIBUTION_CD,'STANDALONE') AS ATTRIBUTION_CD,            
CAST(
TRIM(COALESCE((CASE WHEN XOA.ATTRIBUTION_CD='ATTRIBUTED' THEN XOA.ORDERED_PRODUCT_KEY ELSE NSUB.PRODUCT_KEY END) , -9999  )) || '~' ||
TRIM(NSUB.PRODUCT_KEY) || '~' ||   
TRIM(NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY) ||  '~' ||   
TRIM(COALESCE(XOA.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,-9999)
              ) AS VARCHAR(70))   AS DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,        
CAST (NSUB.TSV_LOCAL_AMT* (COALESCE(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,100)/100)*(coalesce(NXSCA.SPLIT_PCT,100)/100.000000) * COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(26,16)),CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(26,16))) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT ,     
NSUB.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CD,
COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)),CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(32,15))) AS PL_CONVERSION_RATE ,
'1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM  ,
'1900-01-01' AS DD_FB_PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT ,
'=' AS DD_FB_SS_CD                   ,
NSUB.SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV_KEY AS SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV_KEY,     
NSUB.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID AS SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID,           
NSUB.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM  AS BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM,         
NSUB.SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD AS SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD,        
NSUB.INITIAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT AS INITIAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT   ,     
NSUB.RENEWAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT AS RENEWAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT    ,   
NSUB.PREPAID_TERM_MTHS_CNT AS PREPAID_TERM_MTHS_CNT     ,   
NSUB.RENEWAL_CNT AS RENEWAL_CNT ,                  
NSUB.BILLED_DAY_OF_THE_MTH_INT AS BILLED_DAY_OF_THE_MTH_INT , 
NSUB.OFFER_TYPE_CD AS OFFER_TYPE_CD  ,
NSUB.BILLING_MODEL_NAME AS BILLING_MODEL_NAME ,
NSUB.SUBSCR_LINE_STATUS_CD AS SUBSCR_LINE_STATUS_CD ,         
NSUB.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_CD AS SALES_ORDER_TYPE_CD ,  
--CAST(COALESCE (XOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT,100)  AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS ATTRIBUTION_PCT ,
Cast(Coalesce (XOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT,100) *(Coalesce(NXSCA.SPLIT_PCT,100)/100.000000)  AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS ATTRIBUTION_PCT,
NSUB.SRC_CANCEL_DTM AS SRC_CANCEL_DTM ,
NSUB.CHARGE_TYPE_CD AS CHARGE_TYPE_CD,
NSUB.ATO_NAME AS ATO_NAME,
ALCTN.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,
0 AS DV_ORDER_QUANTITY             ,
0 DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT ,
--Cast(((Coalesce (XOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT,100)/100)*(Coalesce(NXSCA.SPLIT_PCT,100))) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT       	  
--CAST((COALESCE (XOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT,100)*COALESCE(NXSCA.SPLIT_PCT,100)) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT       	  
COALESCE(NXSCA.SPLIT_PCT,100) AS DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
NSUB.FLEX_UP_RESV_LINE_FLG 		--added as part of FY22 Athena sep release     	
,NSO.ORDER_ORIGIN_CD  
,CASE WHEN NSUB.SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD IN ('Active','Renewed') THEN
(CASE WHEN NSUB.TERM_START_DTM <= DATE  THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END)
ELSE 'N' END AS DV_RPO_ACTIVE_FLG 
FROM
(SEL FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE,FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE 
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  WHERE  CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG = 'Y')RFM,
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV NSUB
INNER  JOIN 
(SEL SUBSCRIPTION_REFERENCE_ID,SRC_RPTD_SBSCRPTN_CD,SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY,SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY,BK_DEAL_ID,
END_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY,BILL_TO_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY,SHIP_TO_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY,SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY,ORDER_CREATED_DT,

FROM 
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLS_TRX
WHERE REVENUE_TRX_TYPE_CD NOT IN ('CM','DM')
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SUBSCRIPTION_REFERENCE_ID,SRC_RPTD_SBSCRPTN_CD,SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY ORDER BY ORDER_CREATED_DT  DESC, SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY DESC)=1) TRX
ON (TRX.SUBSCRIPTION_REFERENCE_ID = NSUB.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID AND TRX.SRC_RPTD_SBSCRPTN_CD=NSUB.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM AND TRX.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY=NSUB.PRODUCT_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCRPTN_ATTRBTN XOA
ON ( CASE WHEN XOA.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY <0 THEN  XOA.PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY ELSE XOA.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY END )=TRX.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY   
AND ATTRIBUTION_CD='ATTRIBUTED'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON NP.ITEM_KEY=COALESCE(ORDERED_PRODUCT_KEY,NSUB.PRODUCT_KEY) 
INNER  JOIN ( SELECT 
        DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT, PRODUCT_KEY, BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD, BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD, ALLOCATION_PCT 
        FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_TO_PRDT_CLSFTN_ALCTN  WHERE  BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD IN ('BOOKINGS','UNKNOWN')
        GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5
        QUALIFY RANK()  OVER (PARTITION BY DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT,PRODUCT_KEY, BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD  
            ORDER BY  BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD DESC  ) = 1
      ) ALCTN
   ON NP.ITEM_KEY= ALCTN.PRODUCT_KEY 
AND ALCTN.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT=(SEL FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT 
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR   WHERE  CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG = 'Y')
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMT_SLS_TRX NXSCA
ON NXSCA.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY=TRX.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
AND EFFECTIVE_END_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND NXSCA.BK_SLS_TERR_ASGNMT_TYPE_CD = 'DR'
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=TRX.MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY 
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
ON NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY
LEFT JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_V1_TV SOTV
ON NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=SOTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
AND NSO.SS_CODE=SOTV.SS_CD
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR
ON ( NSUB.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CD=NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE
AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE='USD' 
AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE=(SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG='Y'))
WHERE NSUB. SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD IN ('Active','Renewed','UNKNOWN','Not Active')
AND NSO.ORDER_ORIGIN_CD NOT IN ('CCW-FSUB','SWOB-FSUB')

SELECT 
 'SBP' AS TRANSACTION_TYPE,              
 /*CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE='SERVICE' THEN 'Y'  
 WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE <>'SERVICE' THEN 
 CASE WHEN  ALCTN.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD IN ('Service','Software')   AND MONETIZATION_TYPE_CD  IN ('Term','Usage') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END  END AS RPO_FLG,       */
CASE WHEN NSUB.SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD IN ('Active','Renewed') THEN
(CASE WHEN NSUB.TERM_START_DTM <= DATE  THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END)
ELSE 'N' END AS RPO_FLG   ,
 CAST(NSUB.UNBILLED_REV_LOCAL_AMT   * COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(26,16)),CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(26,16))) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT,                    
 (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG  ='Y' ) AS PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH,         
 (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG  ='Y' ) AS FISCAL_MTH,                     
 'Cisco' AS SRC_ENTITY,                     
-999 AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,           
 NSUB.PRODUCT_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY,                   
COALESCE( NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-9999) AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,               
 COALESCE(NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-9999) AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,         
 'UNKNOWN' AS WEB_ORDER_ID,                  
 COALESCE(NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,-999) AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,          
 COALESCE(NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,-999) AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,         
 COALESCE(NAT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) AS SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY ,        
 COALESCE(NSOL.ENDCST_ERP_CST_ACT_LOC_USE_KEY,-999) AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY,              
 CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE='SERVICE' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SERVICE_FLG,                 
CASE WHEN NP.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD NOT IN 'UNKNOWN' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS CORP_FLG,                  
 NSUB.TERM_START_DTM                 AS  CONTRACT_START_DTM, 
 NSUB.TERM_END_DTM                   AS  CONTRACT_END_DTM,  
 CAST((CAST(CAST(NSUB.TERM_END_DTM AS DATE) -  CAST(NSUB.TERM_START_DTM AS DATE) AS INTEGER)*12(FLOAT))/365 AS DECIMAL(15,6) ) AS CONTRACT_TERM ,
 NSOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER AS CONTRACT_NUM,                 
 NAT. BK_DEAL_ID AS ERP_DEAL_ID ,                  
 '1900-01-01' AS AUTO_RELEASE_DT,  
 '=' AS FHI_BNI_FLG, 
 SOTV.DV_CISCO_BOOKED_DT AS CISCO_BOOKED_DT ,                
 '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS ORACLE_BOOK_DTM,
 FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AS PROCESS_DT,                    
 '1900-01-01' AS SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT ,            
 '=' AS HOLD_FLG,                      
 COALESCE(NSO.EARLY_SHIP_ALLOWED_FLAG,'=') AS EARLY_SHIP_FLG,                
 '=' AS SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG      ,
 '1900-01-01' AS CUST_RQSTD_SHIPMENT_DT ,       
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,               
 USER EDW_CREATE_USER,               
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM,                
 USER EDW_UPDATE_USER ,             
  NSUB.PRODUCT_KEY AS ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY,        
 'STANDALONE' AS ATTRIBUTION_CD,            
 CAST(
 TRIM(COALESCE(( NSUB.PRODUCT_KEY ) , -9999  )) || '~' ||
 TRIM(NSUB.PRODUCT_KEY) || '~' ||   
 TRIM(COALESCE((NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY),-9999)) ||  '~' ||   
 TRIM(-9999
               ) AS VARCHAR(70))   AS DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,        
 CAST (NSUB.TSV_LOCAL_AMT*    COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(26,16)),CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(26,16))) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT ,     
 NSUB.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CD,
 COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)),CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(32,15))) AS PL_CONVERSION_RATE ,
 '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM  ,
 '1900-01-01' AS DD_FB_PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT ,
 '=' AS DD_FB_SS_CD                   ,
 NSUB.SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV_KEY AS SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV_KEY,     
 NSUB.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID AS SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID,           
 NSUB.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM  AS BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM,         
 NSUB.SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD AS SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD,        
 NSUB.INITIAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT AS INITIAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT   ,     
 NSUB.RENEWAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT AS RENEWAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT    ,   
 NSUB.PREPAID_TERM_MTHS_CNT AS PREPAID_TERM_MTHS_CNT     ,   
 NSUB.RENEWAL_CNT AS RENEWAL_CNT ,                  
 NSUB.BILLED_DAY_OF_THE_MTH_INT AS BILLED_DAY_OF_THE_MTH_INT , 
 NSUB.OFFER_TYPE_CD AS OFFER_TYPE_CD  ,
 NSUB.BILLING_MODEL_NAME AS BILLING_MODEL_NAME ,
 NSUB.SUBSCR_LINE_STATUS_CD AS SUBSCR_LINE_STATUS_CD ,         
 NSUB.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_CD AS SALES_ORDER_TYPE_CD ,  
 CAST(100  AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS ATTRIBUTION_PCT ,
 NSUB.SRC_CANCEL_DTM AS SRC_CANCEL_DTM ,
 NSUB.CHARGE_TYPE_CD AS CHARGE_TYPE_CD,
 NSUB.ATO_NAME AS ATO_NAME,
 ALCTN.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,
 0 AS DV_ORDER_QUANTITY,
 0 AS DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
 CAST(100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT
FROM
(SEL FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE,FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE 
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  WHERE  CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG = 'Y')RFM,
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV NSUB
LEFT JOIN  $$EXAASVWDB.N_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION SUB
ON SUB.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID=NSUB.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID
AND SUB.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_NUM=NSUB.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM
LEFT  JOIN  (SEL  BK_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_NUM,PRODUCT_KEY,MNR_LN_EXAAS_SBSCRN_SO_LN_KEY FROM  $$EXAASVWDB.N_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_LINE WHERE MNR_LN_EXAAS_SBSCRN_SO_LN_KEY>0 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY  BK_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_NUM,PRODUCT_KEY ORDER BY MNR_LN_EXAAS_SBSCRN_SO_LN_KEY)=1) LINE
ON SUB.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_NUM=LINE.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_NUM
AND  LINE.PRODUCT_KEY  =NSUB.PRODUCT_KEY
  LEFT JOIN  (SEL  AR_TRX_KEY, NATL.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID FROM $$finlglvwdb.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
  WHERE EXISTS(SEL 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV NSUB1
  WHERE NSUB1.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID=NATL.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID)
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID ORDER BY AR_TRX_KEY)=1 ) LINE1 
ON LINE1.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID  =NSUB.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID
LEFT JOIN $$finlglvwdb.N_AR_TRX NAT
ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY=LINE1.AR_TRX_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
 ON NP.ITEM_KEY=NSUB.PRODUCT_KEY
 INNER  JOIN ( SELECT 
         DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT, PRODUCT_KEY, BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD, BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD, ALLOCATION_PCT 
         FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_TO_PRDT_CLSFTN_ALCTN  WHERE  BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD IN ('BOOKINGS','UNKNOWN')
         GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5
         QUALIFY RANK()  OVER (PARTITION BY DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT,PRODUCT_KEY, BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD  
             ORDER BY  BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD DESC  ) = 1
       ) ALCTN
    ON NP.ITEM_KEY= ALCTN.PRODUCT_KEY 
 AND ALCTN.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT=(SEL FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT 
 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR   WHERE  CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG = 'Y')
  LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
 ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=COALESCE(LINE.MNR_LN_EXAAS_SBSCRN_SO_LN_KEY,SUB.MJR_LN_EXAAS_SBSCRN_SO_LN_KEY)
/* AND LINE.MNR_LN_EXAAS_SBSCRN_SO_LN_KEY>0 */
 LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
 ON NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY
LEFT JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_V1_TV SOTV
 ON NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=SOTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
 AND NSO.SS_CODE=SOTV.SS_CD
 LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR
 ON ( NSUB.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CD=NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE
 AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE='USD' 
 AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= (SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG='Y'))
 WHERE NSUB.SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD IN ('Active','Renewed','UNKNOWN','Not Active')
 AND NOT EXISTS(SEL 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_SBP_GROSS_UNBILLED_REVENUE TRX 
 WHERE  TRX.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID = NSUB.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID
 AND TRX.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM=NSUB.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM
 AND TRX.PRODUCT_KEY=NSUB.PRODUCT_KEY
/*AND PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH IN (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG ='Y')*/
)
